_note: Declared state of every archived skill folder (T2-12). An archived folder that still
reads as a live installer is a trap: an operator who opens it follows a superseded
procedure into a live box. tests/unit/archived-skill-tombstones.test.py enforces this
file: every *-ARCHIVED directory at the repository root must appear here, every entry
marked tombstoned=true must carry the tombstone banner, name its successor, contain no
runnable procedure, and have any install.sh in the folder refuse to run with a non-zero
exit. An entry marked tombstoned=false must say WHY it is still pending -- so an
un-tombstoned archive is visibly outstanding rather than silently skipped.

11-superdesign-ARCHIVED.pending: Not named in T2-12. Its live-installer body is still outstanding; tombstone it in a change that owns this folder.

21-tavily-search-ARCHIVED.pending: T2-20 owns the live-call content in this folder. Tombstone it there so the two changes do not collide.
